description_text:
Devilbiss 10 LPM Oxygen Concentrator

Things we like about  Devilbiss 10LPM :


	Lightest and most compact 10 LPM oxygen concentrator
	FDA approved
	90%+ oxygen purity level among all flow rates
	Efficient alarm system
	Reliable brand name
	Highly durable with solid extractor


Things we don't like about  Devilbiss 10LPM :


	Power consumption rate is high as compared to competitors.


 

Manufactured by one of the most reliable brands, Devilbiss 10 LPM is capable of delivering oxygen at the flow rate of 2-10 LPM with a purity level of above 90%. 

Compact and Lightweight: Devilbiss 10 LPM weighs just 19 kgs, making it the lightest and most compact oxygen concentrator in the 10 LPM range. 

Highest Outlet Pressure: The outlet pressure of Devilbiss 10 LPM is 20 psi, higher than any other oxygen concentrator.

Power Consumption: The machine consumes 664 watts of power.

Sound: This oxygen concentrator emits sound at 67 decibels.

Operating Altitude: The operating altitude of Devilbiss 10 LPM is 5000 feet.

Alarms: Loss of power and no flow alarm.

Certificates and Approvals: Devilbiss 10 litre is FDA approved and CE certified.

Warranty: The warranty period of the Devilbiss 10 LPM oxygen concentrator is 2 years.

What's in the Box?

Oxygen Concentrator Machine

Nasal Cannula

Humidifier Bottle

Filter set

Power cable

User Manual and other documents
